title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is the second race of the
Classic Triple Crown. Rumor has it that the other
racers there are intimidated by Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel a little uneasy about such unsavory rumors,
but Narita Brian brushes them off as nothing more
than white noise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each one of the racers in her year is serious about
victory. The thought pleases Narita Brian, setting
her fighting spirit alight.
